name: Compiled HTML Help File Execution
description: Detects execution of compiled HTML help files used for code execution
query:
// Detect CHM file execution via hh.exe
// Trigger on hh.exe opening CHM files from unusual locations
events from edr_process
where exe_path matches "(?i)hh\.exe$"
  and cmdline matches "(?i)(\\temp\\|\\tmp\\|\\downloads\\|\\appdata\\|\\users\\).*\.chm"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
